He graduated with a civil engineering degree from Himalayan Whitehouse International College in Kathmandu and received a postgraduate degree in structural engineering from Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU) in Karnataka, India.

Editor’s Picks 1 Why Nepal’s Gen Z is angry with the government it helped install after 2025 protests 2 From Nepal to Kenya, the most powerful Gen-Z protests that rocked the world

It was in 2013 that Balen first made a name for himself. But it wasn’t in politics, but rather in the world of rap. He participated in a popular rap battle in Nepal, known as Raw Barz, and won the contest.

The contest organiser told Al Jazeera , “More than a rapper, he was a poet. He was very good lyrically, and talked about suppressed (people).”

STORY CONTINUES BELOW THIS AD

Since then, he has penned a number of songs. One of his most famous ones is Balidan (sacrifice), which has generated over 14 million views on YouTube. It speaks of corruption, with one verse stating, “Let me speak, Government — it is not a crime. I fear not to speak the truth. Will the law really come for me, just for raising my voice?”

Balen’s mayoral tenure in Kathmandu

In 2022, Balen made his entry into politics when he contested the Kathmandu mayoral race. As an independent, he swept the polls, winning 61,767 votes, defeating candidates from the major political parties, the Nepali Congress and Communist Party of Nepal (UML), who received 38,341 and 38,117 votes, respectively.

As mayor, Balen worked towards cleaning up Nepal’s haphazardly developed capital. He ordered garbage collectors to stop collecting from government offices, including that of the prime minister, in the middle of a fight with the national government over where waste should be disposed of.

He also locked out an official from his office in city hall when the government would allow him to fire the administrator.

A vehicle with a campaign poster of Balendra Shah waits for passengers ahead of Nepal’s general election, in Gauriganj, Jhapa district, Nepal. File image/Reuters

Balen and the Gen-Z support

Dressed in his signature black jacket and pants, and black shades, Balen quit as mayor last December and joined the centrist Rastriya Swatantra Party.

And since the beginning of his campaign, he has been able to steer support from Nepal’s Gen-Z. His confrontational style has endeared him to large sections of the youth. As Pranaya Rana, a journalist who writes for the Kalam Weekly newsletter, told Al Jazeera , “Young Nepalis see him as a decisive actor, who is not beholden to traditional political or business interests.”

STORY CONTINUES BELOW THIS AD

But even before the elections, Balen had the support of Nepal’s youth. When violent protests broke out in the country last September, which eventually led to the toppling the KP Sharma Oli-led coalition government, many of the Gen-Z called on the 35-year-old to lead the nation.

Balendra Shah along with Rabi Lamichhane, president of the Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP), take part in an election campaign in Kirtipur, Kathmandu, Nepal. File image/Reuters

“During the protests, everyone on social media called for Balen to step up and take over the country,” Yatish Ojha, a 26-year-old lawyer and protester, was quoted as telling Financial Times . “He has the mandate of the Gen Z movement.”

Amid the protests, many even blamed Balen for posting inflammatory messages on social media. But Balen’s supporters note that he was echoing public anger over the protester deaths, not instigating it. “This is why Balen resonates with the youth,” said Surajan Budhathoki, 31, an app designer in Kathmandu who has struggled with red tape and high taxes, to The Wall Street Journal. “An experienced politician knows how to talk in a diplomatic way. Balen on the other hand…no patience — just a raw voice.

STORY CONTINUES BELOW THIS AD

In his campaign, Balen has promised to provide better healthcare and education for the poor, while improving the business climate for entrepreneurs. But that’s a tall order in the country, which has seen political turmoil — it has had more than a dozen governments since the abolition of its 239-year monarchy in 2008 — as well as an economy that is struggling to stay afloat.

Controversies that haunt Balen

Despite his popularity, Balen has been a controversial choice. His choice of campaigning in an expensive Land Rover Defender worth Nepal Rs 40 million, while the country has been struggling economically, raised eyebrows.

Many accused him of a lack of transparency over the vehicle’s ownership and use, while some pointed out that, despite promoting modesty in public office. The car, it turned out, had been given to him by a wealthy businessman for use during his campaign.

People wave towards Balendra Shah as he campaigns before voting took place on March 5. File image/Reuters

Another such controversy was in 2023 when India installed a mural of “Akhand Bharat” (a Greater India). In turn, Shah hung a “Greater Nepal” map in his office, including territories that once belonged to Nepal but now lie within India’s borders. His move soon escalated into a diplomatic hurdle.

STORY CONTINUES BELOW THIS AD

He has also faced criticism from groups including Human Rights Watch for using police “to mistreat the urban poor”, including cracking down on street vendors and landless residents of urban slums.

However, his allure amongst the youth seems not have dimmed. “He is the only one who can take the country forward,” said one of his many supporters.

With inputs from agencies

जेना-जेना वोट के गिनती भ रहल अछि, एहन बुझाइत अछि जे देश युवा दिस झुकि रहल अछि, शुरुआती रुझान मे राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्रता पार्टी (आरएसपी) के अग्रणी देखा रहल अछि.

कथा एहि विज्ञापनक नीचाँ जारी अछि

मुदा बलेन्द्र शाह ठीक-ठीक के छथि? की ओ नेपालक अगिला प्रधानमंत्री हेताह?

बलेन शाह के रास्ता झूलते मतदाता |

बृहस्पतिदिन देशमे मतदान भेलाक बाद नेपालमे मतगणना शुरु भऽ गेल अछि । आइ बाद मे परिणाम भेटबाक उम्मीद अछि, मुदा पूरा देशव्यापी गिनती मे कई दिन लागि सकैत अछि। ई चुनाव २००६ म॑ गृहयुद्ध के समाप्त होय के बाद स॑ तीन करोड़ लोगऽ के हिमालयन गणराज्य म॑ सबस॑ गरम चुनाव म॑ स॑ एक रहलऽ छै ।

अंतिम गिनती मे रासपा नेता नेकपा एमाले अध्यक्ष आ पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री केपी शर्मा ओली पर अपन अग्रता बढ़ा देलनि। काठमांडू पोस्ट मे प्रकाशित रिपोर्ट के अनुसार शाह के 10,190 मत भेटल अछि, जखन कि ओली के 4087 मत भेटल अछि। मैदान मे अन्य उम्मीदवार, जेना नेपाली कांग्रेस क गगन कुमार थापा पांच सीट पर अग्रणी छलाह।

शाह के पक्ष मे शुरुआती गति के संग 35 वर्षीय शाह देश के अगिला प्रधानमंत्री के रूप मे नेपाल के राजनीतिक परिदृश्य के संभावित रूप सं नव रूप देबय के रास्ता पर छथिन्ह.

रैपर स राजनीतिज्ञ बनल आ राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी (आरएसपी) के प्रधानमंत्री पद के उम्मीदवार बलेन्द्र शाह 5 मार्च के नेपाल के काठमांडू मे आम चुनाव के दौरान मतदान करैत छथिन्ह

बालेन शाह के प्रारंभिक जीवन

मुदा नेपाल के अगिला पीएम बनय वाला एहि युवा तुर्क के बारे मे हमरा सभ के कि पता अछि.

1990 म॑ पारंपरिक चिकित्सा केरऽ डॉक्टर आरू घरऽ के काम करै वाला के घरऽ म॑ जन्मलऽ बेलेन, जेकरा अपनऽ समर्थकऽ न॑ जान॑ छै, चारो भाई-बहिन म॑ सबस॑ छोटऽ छै । सितंबर म॑ अल जजीरा क॑ देलऽ गेलऽ साक्षात्कार म॑ – हुनकऽ मौत स॑ तीन महीना पहलें – हुनकऽ पिता न॑ बालेन क॑ एगो “उज्ज्वल आरू सरल” बच्चा के रूप म॑ याद करलकै । पिताक काज बेर-बेर घर सँ दूर ल’ जाइत छल, मुदा बालेन’क बचपन’क एकटा स्पष्ट स्मृति शाह’क लेल ठाढ़ भ’ गेलै: “ओ कविता लिखैत छलाह. से हमरा मोन अछि, कारण हमहूँ कविता लिखैत छलहुँ.”

काठमांडू स्थित हिमालयन व्हाइटहाउस इन्टरनेशनल कॉलेज सँ सिविल इंजीनियरिंग के डिग्री प्राप्त केने छलाह आ भारत के कर्नाटक स्थित विश्वेश्वराय टेक्नोलॉजिकल यूनिवर्सिटी (वीटीयू) सँ स्ट्रक्चरल इंजीनियरिंग मे स्नातकोत्तर डिग्री प्राप्त केने छलाह |

संपादक के पिक्स 1 नेपाल के जेन जेड 2025 के विरोध प्रदर्शन के बाद जे सरकार के स्थापना में मदद केने छल ओकरा पर किएक नाराज अछि 2 नेपाल स केन्या तक, जेन-जेड के सबस शक्तिशाली विरोध प्रदर्शन जे दुनिया के हिला देलक

2013 मे भेल छल जखन बालेन पहिल बेर अपन नाम बनौलनि। मुदा राजनीति मे नहि, रैप’क दुनिया मे छल. ओ नेपालक एकटा लोकप्रिय रैप युद्ध मे भाग लेलनि, जे रॉ बर्ज के नाम सँ जानल जाइत अछि, आ प्रतियोगिता जीतलनि ।

प्रतियोगिता के आयोजक न॑ अल जजीरा क॑ बतैलकै , “एक रैपर स॑ भी जादा, वू एगो कवि छेलै ।गीतात्मक रूप स॑ वू बहुत अच्छा छेलै, आरू दबलऽ (लोग) के बात करै छेलै।”

कथा एहि विज्ञापनक नीचाँ जारी अछि

तहिया सँ ओ कतेको गीतक लेखन केने छथि । हुनकऽ एगो सबसें प्रसिद्ध छै बलिदान (बलिदान), जेकरा यूट्यूब प॑ १ करोड़ ४० लाख स॑ भी अधिक व्यूज मिललऽ छै । ई भ्रष्टाचार के बात करै छै, जेकरा में एक श्लोक में कहलऽ गेलऽ छै, “हमरा बजै दियऽ सरकार — ई कोनो अपराध नै छै। हमरा सच नै बोलै के डर छै। की सचमुच कानून हमरा लेली आबै वाला छै, खाली आवाज उठैला के लेलऽ?”

काठमांडू मे बालेन के मेयर के कार्यकाल

2022 मे काठमांडू मेयर पदक दौड़ मे बैलेन राजनीति मे प्रवेश केलनि। निर्दलीय के रूप मे ओ चुनाव मे स्वीप केलनि, जाहि मे ओ 61,767 मत जीत के प्रमुख राजनीतिक दल नेपाली कांग्रेस आ नेपाल कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी (एमाले) के उम्मीदवार के पराजित केलनि, जेकरा क्रमशः 38,341 आ 38,117 मत भेटल छल।

मेयर के रूप मे बालेन नेपाल के बेतरतीब ढंग सं विकसित राजधानी के साफ करय के दिशा मे काज केलनि. ओ राष्ट्रीय सरकार स कचरा कतय क निपटारा करबाक चाही एहि पर झगड़ा क बीच प्रधानमंत्री सहित सरकारी कार्यालय स कचरा संग्रहण कए बंद करबाक आदेश देलथि।

संगहि ओ सिटी हॉल मे अपन ऑफिस सं एकटा अधिकारी के ताला लगा देलखिन्ह जखन सरकार हुनका प्रशासक के बर्खास्त करय के अनुमति देत.

नेपालक झापा जिलाक गौरीगंज मे नेपालक आम निर्वाचन सँ पहिने बलेन्द्र शाहक प्रचार पोस्टर सहित एकटा वाहन यात्रीक प्रतीक्षा मे अछि । फाइल छवि/रायटर

बालेन आ जेन-जेड समर्थन

अपनऽ सिग्नेचर ब्लैक जैकेट आरू पैंट, आरू ब्लैक शेड म॑ सजलऽ बेलेन न॑ पिछला दिसंबर म॑ मेयर के पद छोड़ी क॑ केंद्रीयवादी राष्ट्रिय स्वतंत्र पार्टी म॑ शामिल होय गेलै ।

आरू अपनऽ अभियान केरऽ शुरुआत स॑ ही नेपाल केरऽ जेन-जेड स॑ समर्थन जुटाबै म॑ सफल रहलऽ छै । हुनकऽ टकराव वाला शैली न॑ हुनका युवा केरऽ बड़ऽ वर्ग के प्रिय बनैल॑ छै । जेना कि कलाम साप्ताहिक न्यूजलेटर के लेल लिखय वाला पत्रकार प्राणाया राणा अल जजीरा के कहलनि जे, “युवा नेपाली हुनका एकटा निर्णायक अभिनेता के रूप मे देखैत छथि, जे पारंपरिक राजनीतिक या व्यापारिक हित के ऋणी नहि छथि।”

कथा एहि विज्ञापनक नीचाँ जारी अछि

मुदा चुनाव सं पहिने सेहो बलेन के नेपाल के युवा के समर्थन छल. पिछला सितंबर में जखन देश में हिंसक विरोध प्रदर्शन भेल छल, जाहि सं अंततः केपी शर्मा ओली के नेतृत्व वाला गठबंधन सरकार के गिरा देल गेल छल त जेन-जेड के बहुतो लोक 35 वर्षीय खिलाड़ी के राष्ट्र के नेतृत्व करय के आह्वान केलखिन्ह.

नेपाल के काठमांडू के कीर्तिपुर में राष्ट्रिय स्वतंत्र पार्टी के अध्यक्ष रबी लामिछाने के साथ बलेन्द्र शाह चुनाव प्रचार में भाग लेते हुए। फाइल छवि/रायटर

26 वर्षीय वकील आ प्रदर्शनकारी यतीश ओझा के हवाला सं फाइनेंशियल टाइम्स के कहल गेल अछि जे, विरोध के दौरान सोशल मीडिया पर सब गोटे बलेन के कदम बढ़ा क देश पर कब्जा करय के आह्वान केलखिन्ह. “जेन जेड आन्दोलनक जनादेश हुनका लग छनि।”

विरोध प्रदर्शन के बीच बहुतो लोक त सोशल मीडिया पर भड़काऊ संदेश पोस्ट करय लेल बेलेन के जिम्मेदार तक ठहरौलखिन्ह. लेकिन बालेन के समर्थक नोट करै छै कि हुनी प्रदर्शनकारी के मौत प॑ जन आक्रोश क॑ गूंजी रहलऽ छेलै, नै कि एकरा भड़काबै के । लालफीताशाही आरू उच्च कर स॑ जूझै वाला काठमांडू केरऽ ऐप डिजाइनर 31 वर्षीय सूरजन बुधाथोकी न॑ द वाल स्ट्रीट जर्नल क॑ बतैलकै कि यही वजह छै कि बालेन युवा सिनी के बीच गुंजायमान होय ​​छै । “अनुभवी राजनेता कूटनीतिक तरीका स गप करब जनैत अछि। दोसर दिस बेलेन...कोनो धैर्य नहि — बस कच्चा आवाज।

कथा एहि विज्ञापनक नीचाँ जारी अछि

अपनऽ अभियान म॑ बालेन न॑ गरीबऽ लेली बेहतर स्वास्थ्य सेवा आरू शिक्षा उपलब्ध करै के वादा करल॑ छै, जबकि उद्यमी सिनी लेली व्यापारिक माहौल म॑ सुधार करलऽ जैतै । लेकिन ई देश केरऽ एगो लंबा आदेश छै, जेकरा म॑ राजनीतिक उथल-पुथल देखलऽ गेलऽ छै — २००८ म॑ अपनऽ २३९ साल केरऽ राजतंत्र केरऽ समाप्त होय के बाद स॑ एकरऽ दर्जन स॑ भी अधिक सरकार छै — साथ ही साथ एगो ऐसनऽ अर्थव्यवस्था भी छै जे तैरते रहै लेली संघर्ष करी रहलऽ छै ।

विवाद जे बालेन के सताबैत अछि

अपनऽ लोकप्रियता के बावजूद बेलेन एगो विवादित पसंद रहलऽ छै । नेपाल के चारि करोड़ के महग लैंड रोवर डिफेंडर मे प्रचार करय के हुनकर पसंद, जखन कि देश आर्थिक रूप सं संघर्षरत रहल अछि, भौंह उठौलक.

बहुतो लोक हुनका पर गाड़ी के मालिकाना हक आ उपयोग पर पारदर्शिता के कमी के आरोप लगौलनि, जखन कि किछु गोटे एहि बात के ओर इशारा केलनि जे, सार्वजनिक पद पर विनम्रता के बढ़ावा देला के बावजूद. पता चलल जे ई गाड़ी हुनका एकटा सम्पन्न व्यवसायी अपन प्रचारक दौरान उपयोगक लेल देने छल ।

लोक बलेन्द्र शाह के तरफ लहराबैत छथिन्ह किएक त हुनकर प्रचार 5 मार्च के वोटिंग सं पहिने.फाइल इमेज/रायटर

एहन एकटा आओर विवाद छल 2023 मे जखन भारत “अखंड भारत” (एकटा पैघ भारत) क भित्ति चित्र लगा देलक । बदला में शाह अपन कार्यालय में “ग्रेटर नेपाल” के नक्शा टांग देलखिन, जाहि में ओ इलाका शामिल छल जे कहियो नेपाल के छल मुदा आब भारत के सीमा में पड़ल अछि | हुनकऽ ई कदम जल्दिये कूटनीतिक बाधा म॑ बदली गेलै ।

कथा एहि विज्ञापनक नीचाँ जारी अछि

हुनका ह्यूमन राइट्स वॉच सहित समूहऽ के आलोचना के सामना करना पड़लऽ छै कि हुनी पुलिस के इस्तेमाल “शहरी गरीबऽ के साथ दुर्व्यवहार करै लेली” करलकै, जेकरा म॑ सड़कऽ प॑ बेचै वाला आरू शहरी झुग्गी-झोपड़ी के भूमिहीन निवासी प॑ दबाव डालना भी शामिल छै ।

ओना युवा सभक बीच हुनकर आकर्षण मंद नहि भेल बुझाइत अछि । हुनकऽ बहुत सारा समर्थकऽ म॑ स॑ एगो न॑ कहलकै कि देश क॑ आगू बढ़ाबै वाला एकमात्र वू छै ।

एजेंसियों के इनपुट के साथ

गूगल पर फर्स्टपोस्ट के फॉलो करू . भूराजनीति आ कूटनीति सं ल क विश्व समाचार धरि सब किछु पर अंतर्दृष्टि व्याख्याकार , तीक्ष्ण राय , आ गहन नवीनतम समाचार प्राप्त करू . नवीनतम दृष्टिकोण स जानकारी केवल फर्स्टपोस्ट पर बनल रहू।

title: Who is rapper and former mayor Balen Shah, frontrunner for Nepal PM's post? - The Federal
description: Who is rapper and former mayor Balen Shah, frontrunner for Nepal PM's post?  The Federal
publisher.title: The Federal
full_article:
Balendra Shah, popularly known as Balen Shah, is a 35-year-old structural engineer, rapper, who is currently a leading candidate to become the Prime Minister of Nepal in the March 2026 general elections.

The rapper-turned-politician is emerging as one of the most talked-about challengers in the race and could potentially become the country’s youngest Prime Minister if the momentum behind his party continues.

Rapper turned politician

Balen first gained national fame as a rapper in the 'Nephop' scene, known for lyrics that criticised corruption and the political establishment. He became a youth icon and in May 2022, he stunned the country by winning the election as Mayor of Kathmandu as an independent candidate, defeating seasoned politicians from major parties.

Also read: Gen Z favourite Balen Shah’s RSP leads in 45 constituencies in Nepal elections

His sharp criticism of corruption, bureaucratic inefficiency, and entrenched political elites helped him build a large following among young voters.

During his three-and-a-half-year tenure as Mayor, he was known for live-streaming municipal meetings for transparency, aggressively demolishing illegal structures and clearing public land, implementing "textbook-free Fridays" in schools and improving waste management.

However, he ran into controversy, when he faced criticism from rights groups for his "heavy-handed" treatment of street vendors and the urban poor during his city-beautification drives.

Gen Z movement

Balen emerged as a prominent face among young protesters during the Gen Z demonstrations in September 2025.

Young people took to the streets across the Himalayan nation to fight against corruption and social media restrictions.

Prime Ministerial bid

In January 2026, Balen resigned as Mayor of Kathmandu to enter national politics. He joined the Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP), which is led by former television host-turned-politician Rabi Lamichhane and was officially named their Prime Ministerial candidate for the March 5, 2026, general elections.

In a high-stakes move, he is contesting the parliamentary seat in Jhapa-5, directly challenging the veteran former Prime Minister KP Sharma Oli in his own political stronghold.

Background

He was born on April 27, 1990, in Naradevi, Kathmandu, to a family of Maithili origin. He is the youngest son of an Ayurvedic practitioner, Ram Narayan Shah. His parents relocated to Kathmandu from the Mahottari District of Madhesh Province after his father was assigned to Naradevi Ayurvedic Hospital.

Also read: Nepal records over 10% turnout till 11 am in first election since Gen Z protests Balen is a qualified structural engineer with a Master’s degree (MTech) from Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU) in Karnataka, India.

He is almost always seen in public wearing his signature dark sunglasses and sharp suits.

What makes Shah popular?

What makes Shah popular? Shah’s appeal lies in his outsider status. Much like the Gen Z protests that reshaped Nepal’s political scene, his campaign emphasises generational change and the dismantling of traditional political networks.

His foreign policy is largely framed around balanced and pragmatic diplomacy. He believes in maintaining Nepal’s historic economic and people-to-people ties with India, and seeks more equitable economic partnerships and infrastructure cooperation.

Unlike some leaders who have adopted sharper nationalist rhetoric, Shah has generally emphasised pragmatism and economic cooperation, appealing to voters who want stability in cross-border trade, employment, and energy ties.
translated:
बलेन्द्र शाह, जेकरा बलेन् शाह के नाम स॑ लोकप्रिय छै, ३५ वर्षीय संरचनात्मक अभियंता, रैपर छै, जे अभी मार्च २०२६ के आम चुनाव म॑ नेपाल केरऽ प्रधानमंत्री बन॑ के प्रमुख उम्मीदवार छै ।

रैपर स॑ राजनीतिज्ञ बनलऽ ई दौड़ म॑ सबस॑ चर्चा म॑ आबै वाला चुनौती दै वाला म॑ स॑ एक के रूप म॑ उभर॑ लगलऽ छै आरू अगर हुनकऽ पार्टी केरऽ पीछू के गति जारी रहतै त॑ संभावित रूप स॑ देश केरऽ सबस॑ कम उम्र के प्रधानमंत्री बनी सकै छै ।

रैपर राजनीतिज्ञ बनल

बालेन क॑ सबसें पहलऽ रैपर के रूप म॑ राष्ट्रीय प्रसिद्धि मिललै ‘नेफोप’ दृश्य म॑, जे भ्रष्टाचार आरू राजनीतिक संस्थापन के आलोचना करै वाला गीत लेली जानलऽ जाय छै । ओ युवा आइकन बनल आ मई २०२२ मे काठमांडू के मेयर के रूप मे निर्दलीय उम्मीदवार के रूप मे चुनाव जीत क देश के स्तब्ध क देलक, जाहि मे ओ प्रमुख दल के अनुभवी राजनेता के पराजित क देलक।

इहो पढ़ू : नेपाल चुनाव मे 45 क्षेत्र मे जेन जेड फेवरेट बलेन शाह के आरएसपी अग्रणी अछि

भ्रष्टाचार, नौकरशाही अक्षमता, आरू जड़ जमाय क॑ राजनीतिक अभिजात वर्ग केरऽ हुनकऽ तीक्ष्ण आलोचना न॑ हुनका युवा मतदाता सिनी के बीच एगो बड़ऽ फॉलोइंग बनाबै म॑ मदद करलकै ।

मेयर के रूप मँ साढ़े तीन साल के कार्यकाल के दौरान पारदर्शिता लेली नगर निगम के बैठक क लाइव स्ट्रीमिंग, अवैध संरचना क आक्रामक तरीका स॑ तोड़ै आरू सार्वजनिक जमीन क॑ खाली करै, स्कूलऽ म॑ "पाठ्यपुस्तक मुक्त शुक्रवार" लागू करै आरू कचरा प्रबंधन म॑ सुधार लेली जानलऽ जाय छेलै ।

लेकिन, हुनका विवाद में पड़लै, जब॑ हुनका शहर-सौंदर्य केरऽ अभियान के दौरान सड़कऽ प॑ बेचै वाला आरू शहरी गरीबऽ के साथ "भारी हाथ" के व्यवहार के कारण अधिकार समूहऽ के आलोचना के सामना करना पड़लै ।

जनरल जेड आंदोलन

सितंबर २०२५ म॑ जेन जेड प्रदर्शन के दौरान युवा प्रदर्शनकारी के बीच बेलेन एगो प्रमुख चेहरा के रूप म॑ उभरी क॑ सामने ऐलै ।

भ्रष्टाचार आ सोशल मीडिया पर प्रतिबंध के खिलाफ लड़य लेल पूरा हिमालय राष्ट्र मे युवा सड़क पर उतरि गेलाह.

प्रधानमंत्री के बोली

जनवरी २०२६ मे बालेन राष्ट्रिय राजनीति मे प्रवेश करबाक लेल काठमाण्डौ मेयर पद सँ इस्तीफा दऽ देलक । हुनी राष्ट्रिय स्वतंत्र पार्टी (आरएसपी) म॑ शामिल होय गेलै, जेकरऽ नेतृत्व पूर्व टेलीविजन होस्ट-बनलऽ-राजनेता रबी लामिछाने करी रहलऽ छै आरू आधिकारिक तौर प॑ ५ मार्च २०२६ क॑ होबै वाला आम चुनाव लेली हुनकऽ प्रधानमंत्री पद के उम्मीदवार नामित करलऽ गेलै ।

उच्च दांव वाला कदम उठाबैत ओ झापा-5 मे संसदीय सीट पर चुनाव लड़ि रहल छथि, जाहि मे ओ अपन राजनीतिक गढ़ मे अनुभवी पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री केपी शर्मा ओली कए सीधा चुनौती द रहल छथि।

पृष्ठभूमि

हिनक जन्म 27 अप्रैल 1990 मे काठमांडू के नारादेवी मे मैथिली मूल के परिवार मे भेल छलन्हि. आयुर्वेदिक साधक राम नारायण शाहक छोटका पुत्र छथि । पिता के नारादेवी आयुर्वेदिक अस्पताल मे नियुक्ति के बाद हुनकर माता-पिता मधेश प्रांत के महोत्तरी जिला स काठमांडू स्थानांतरित भ गेलाह।

इहो पढ़ू : जेन जेड के विरोध के बाद पहिल चुनाव में भोर 11 बजे तक नेपाल में 10% स बेसी मतदान भेल बालेन भारत के कर्नाटक के विश्वेश्वराय टेक्नोलॉजिकल यूनिवर्सिटी (वीटीयू) स स्नातकोत्तर डिग्री (एमटेक) के संग योग्य संरचनात्मक अभियंता छैथ।

लगभग हरदम सार्वजनिक रूप स अपन सिग्नेचर डार्क धूप के चश्मा आ तेज सूट पहिरने देखल जाइत छथि ।

शाह के लोकप्रिय की बनबैत अछि ?

शाह के लोकप्रिय की बनबैत अछि ? शाह केरऽ अपील हुनकऽ बाहरी हैसियत म॑ छै । नेपाल केरऽ राजनीतिक दृश्य क॑ नया रूप दै वाला जेन जेड विरोध प्रदर्शन के तरह ही हुनकऽ अभियान म॑ पीढ़ी के परिवर्तन आरू पारंपरिक राजनीतिक नेटवर्क क॑ तोड़ै प॑ जोर देलऽ गेलऽ छै ।

हुनकऽ विदेश नीति बहुत हद तलक संतुलित आरू व्यावहारिक कूटनीति के आसपास बनलऽ छै । भारत के साथ नेपाल के ऐतिहासिक आर्थिक आरू जन-जन संबंध क॑ कायम रखै म॑ विश्वास करै छै, आरू अधिक समान आर्थिक साझेदारी आरू बुनियादी ढांचा के सहयोग के तलाश करै छै ।

कुछ नेता सिनी के विपरीत जे तीक्ष्ण राष्ट्रवादी बयानबाजी अपनान॑ छै, शाह न॑ आम तौर प॑ व्यावहारिकता आरू आर्थिक सहयोग प॑ जोर देल॑ छै, जेकरा स॑ वू मतदाता सिनी क॑ अपील करलऽ गेलऽ छै जे सीमा पार स॑ व्यापार, रोजगार, आरू ऊर्जा संबंध म॑ स्थिरता चाहै छै ।

full_article:
Bagmati Election 2082 Result Live: Early vote counting in Nepal’s parliamentary elections has brought the spotlight on the rapidly rising Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP). The relatively new political force is showing strong performance in several constituencies of Kathmandu Valley, indicating growing support among urban voters.

The election is one of the most closely watched political contests in recent years, as it follows a period of major political change and youth-driven movements in the country. Early trends suggest that RSP candidates are gaining a strong foothold in many constituencies, particularly in Bagmati Province.

Bagmati Election 2026 Result

Kathmandu-6 has become one of the most closely watched constituencies in the Bagmati Province during the ongoing vote count. The seat is attracting significant attention as the Rastriya Swatantra Party attempts to strengthen its presence in the capital region.

RSP candidate Shishir Khanal is emerging as a key contender in the constituency as early counting trends indicate strong support for the party in Kathmandu districts. The results from the capital region could play an important role in shaping the overall outcome of the parliamentary election.

Political analysts believe that the performance of RSP candidates in Kathmandu constituencies reflects a broader shift in voter preferences, particularly among younger and urban voters.

Kathmandu-6 Election Results 2026

Early counting data show that the Rastriya Swatantra Party is ahead in multiple constituencies across Kathmandu. This trend highlights the party’s growing popularity in Nepal’s capital region.

In Kathmandu-6, RSP candidate Shishir Khanal has taken an early lead with 11,325 votes. Nepali Congress candidate Krishna Baniya Chhetri has secured 3,686 votes, while Aman Kumar Maskey of CPN (UML) has received 1,998 votes.

Kathmandu-7 Election Results 2026

In Kathmandu-7, RSP candidate Ganesh Parajuli is also ahead with 8,602 votes after getting 10,273 votes. Prakash Shrestha from CPN (UML) has garnered 1,671 votes, while Pramodhari Guragain of the Nepali Congress has secured 720 votes.

Kathmandu-8 Election Results 2026

In Kathmandu-8, RSP candidate Biraj Bhakta Shrestha continues to lead with 14,364 votes. Suman Sayami from the Nepali Communist Party has secured 2,166 votes, while Sapana Rajbhandari of the Nepali Congress has obtained 1,888 votes, according to Kathmandu Post.

Kathmandu-9 Election Results 2026

In Kathmandu-9, RSP candidate Dol Prasad Aryal continues to lead with 7,567 votes. Nanu Maiya Bastola from the Nepali Congress has secured 1,527 votes, while Ajay Kranti Shakya of the CPN-UML has obtained 1,233 votes.

Kathmandu-10 Election Results 2026

Meanwhile, in Kathmandu-10, RSP candidate Pradip Bista is leading with 11,402 votes. Nepali Congress candidate Himal Karki has secured 2,744 votes, while Binod Shrestha of the CPN-UML has received 1,654 votes, according to Kathmandu Post.

Nepal Election Result 2026 Live: What Early Trends Indicate

The early results from Kathmandu constituencies suggest that the Rastriya Swatantra Party is making significant gains in urban areas. If the trend continues, the party could emerge as a strong political force in Nepal’s parliament.

With counting still underway across many constituencies, the final results will determine how the balance of power shapes up in the country’s federal parliament. Political observers expect several close contests as counting progresses in the coming hours.

बागमती चुनाव 2026 परिणाम

जारी मतगणना के दौरान काठमांडू-6 बागमती प्रदेश के सबस बेसी नजरि पड़ल क्षेत्र मे स एक बनि गेल अछि। राजधानी क्षेत्र मे राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी अपन उपस्थिति मजबूत करबाक प्रयास मे रहल एहि सीट पर काफी ध्यान आकर्षित भ रहल अछि।

काठमांडू जिल्ला मे शुरुआती मतगणना के प्रवृत्ति पार्टी के मजबूत समर्थन के संकेत दैत क्षेत्र मे रासपा प्रत्याशी शिशिर खनाल प्रमुख दावेदार के रूप मे उभर रहल छथिन्ह. राजधानी क्षेत्र स निकलल परिणाम संसदीय चुनाव क समग्र परिणाम कए आकार देबा मे अहम भूमिका निभा सकैत अछि।

राजनीतिक विश्लेषक के मानना ​​छै कि काठमांडू क्षेत्र मँ आरएसपी के उम्मीदवार के प्रदर्शन मतदाता के पसंद मँ व्यापक बदलाव के दर्शाबै छै, खास करी क युवा आरू शहरी मतदाता के बीच ।

काठमाण्डू-६ निर्वाचन परिणाम २०२६

शुरुआती गिनती के आंकड़ा बताबैत अछि जे काठमांडू भरि मे कईटा निर्वाचन क्षेत्र मे राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी आगू अछि। ई प्रवृत्ति नेपाल केरऽ राजधानी क्षेत्र म॑ पार्टी केरऽ बढ़तऽ लोकप्रियता क॑ रेखांकित करी रहलऽ छै ।

काठमांडू–६ मे रासपा प्रत्याशी शिशिर खनाल ११ हजार ३२५ मत सँ जल्दी अग्रता बढल अछि । नेपाली कांग्रेस प्रत्याशी कृष्ण बनिया क्षेत्री ३,६८६ मत प्राप्त केने अछि, ओतहि नेकपा के अमन कुमार मास्के के १,९९८ मत भेटल अछि ।

काठमाण्डौ-७ निर्वाचन परिणाम २०२६

काठमांडू-7 मे आरएसपा प्रत्याशी गणेश पराजुली सेहो 10,273 वोट पाबि 8602 वोट सं आगू छथिन्ह. नेकपा (एमाले) सँ प्रकाश श्रेष्ठ १६७१ मत, नेपाली कांग्रेसक प्रमोधारी गुरागैन ७२० मत प्राप्त केने छथि ।

काठमांडू-८ निर्वाचन परिणाम २०२६

काठमांडू-८ मे रासपा प्रत्याशी विराज भक्त श्रेष्ठ १४,३६४ मत सँ अग्रणी बनल अछि । काठमांडू पोस्टके अनुसार नेपाली कम्युनिस्ट पार्टीके सुमन सयामी २,१६६ मत प्राप्त केने अछि, ओतहि नेपाली कांग्रेसके सपना राजभंडारी १,८८८ मत प्राप्त केने अछि ।

काठमाण्डौ-९ निर्वाचन परिणाम २०२६

काठमांडू–९मे रासपा प्रत्याशी डोलप्रसाद अर्यल ७५६७ मतसँ अग्रणी रहल अछि । नेपाली कांग्रेस स नानु मैया बस्तोला १५२७ मत प्राप्त केने छथि, ओतहि नेकपा एमाले के अजय क्रांति शाक्य १,२३३ मत प्राप्त केने छथि ।

काठमांडू-१० निर्वाचन परिणाम २०२६

ओतहि काठमांडू-१० मे रासपा प्रत्याशी प्रदीप बिष्ट ११,४०२ मत सँ अग्रणी छथि । काठमांडू पोस्टके अनुसार नेपाली कांग्रेस प्रत्याशी हिमल कार्की २,७४४ मत प्राप्त केने अछि, ओतहि नेकपा एमाले के बिनोद श्रेष्ठ के १,६५४ मत भेटल अछि ।

नेपाल निर्वाचन परिणाम २०२६ लाइव : प्रारम्भिक प्रवृत्ति कि संकेत करैत अछि

काठमांडू निर्वाचन क्षेत्रसँ प्रारम्भिक परिणामसँ राष्ट्रिय स्वतन्त्र पार्टी शहरी क्षेत्रमे काफी तरक्की कऽ रहल अछि । अगर ई प्रवृत्ति जारी रहत त नेपाल के संसद मे पार्टी एकटा मजबूत राजनीतिक शक्ति के रूप मे उभर सकैत अछि.

अखनी भी बहुत क्षेत्रऽ म॑ गिनती जारी छै, ई लेली अंतिम परिणाम ई तय करतै कि देश केरऽ संघीय संसद म॑ सत्ता के संतुलन केना बनतै । राजनीतिक पर्यवेक्षक के उम्मीद छै कि आबै वाला घंटो म॑ गिनती बढ़ला के साथ-साथ कईएक करीबी मुकाबला होतै ।

title: China congratulates Nepal on smooth completion of voting for parliamentary election - Xinhua
description: China congratulates Nepal on smooth completion of voting for parliamentary election  Xinhua
publisher.title: Xinhua
full_article:
BEIJING, March 6 (Xinhua) -- China congratulates Nepal on the timely and smooth completion of the voting for a new House of Representatives and welcomes Nepal's steady progress in advancing its national political agenda, a foreign ministry spokesperson said on Friday.

Spokesperson Mao Ning made the remarks at a regular news briefing after the election committee of Nepal said that around 60 percent of eligible voters cast their votes in the House of Representatives elections and the polls were largely peaceful across the country.

Mao said that as traditional friendly neighbors, China attaches great importance to its relations with Nepal, and both sides have consistently supported each other's efforts to safeguard independence, sovereignty and territorial integrity.
translated:
बीजिंग, 6 मार्च (वार्ता) विदेश मंत्रालय के प्रवक्ता शुक्रदिन कहलनि जे, चीन नव प्रतिनिधि सभा के मतदान समय पर आ सुचारू रूप सं पूरा भेला पर नेपाल के बधाई दैत अछि आ नेपाल के राष्ट्रीय राजनीतिक एजेंडा के आगू बढ़ेबा मे लगातार प्रगति के स्वागत करैत अछि।

प्रवक्ता माओ निंग नेपालक निर्वाचन समिति द्वारा प्रतिनिधि सभा के चुनाव मे लगभग 60 प्रतिशत पात्र मतदाता अपन मत देलक आ देश भरि मे चुनाव बहुत हद तक शांतिपूर्ण रहल कहला के बाद नियमित समाचार ब्रिफिंग मे ई बात कहलनि।

माओ कहलनि जे, पारंपरिक मित्रवत पड़ोसी देशक रूप मे चीन नेपालक संग अपन संबंध केँ बहुत महत्व दैत अछि, आ स्वतंत्रता, संप्रभुता आ क्षेत्रीय अखंडताक रक्षाक लेल दुनू पक्ष एक दोसराक प्रयास मे लगातार सहयोग करैत रहल अछि।

title: Lead Her Game powers Basketball For Gender Equality in Nepal - FIBA
description: Lead Her Game powers Basketball For Gender Equality in Nepal  FIBA
publisher.title: FIBA
full_article:
BUDHANILKANTHA (Nepal) – 13-year-old Sita was a shy girl. Hailing from a marginalized community in Nepal, she was initially unsure of herself and very reserved.

“I have no idea why I am here,” would have been the thought running through her head as the first-ever Lead Her Game program tipped off in Kathmandu.

“Will I be able to fit in?” Sita would have wondered, having never participated in organized sports before.

Basketball For Gender Equality

Initiatives like Lead Her Game in Nepal align with FIBA’s Strategic Priority “Women in Basketball” to increase female players’ participation across the globe Initiatives like Lead Her Game in Nepal align with FIBA’s Strategic Priority “Women in Basketball” to increase female players’ participation across the globe Initiatives like Lead Her Game in Nepal align with FIBA’s Strategic Priority “Women in Basketball” to increase female players’ participation across the globe

As we celebrate International Women’s Day on March 8, it is important to acknowledge that many communities around the world continue to navigate long‑standing social norms that have shaped and limited women.

For girls like Sita, sports are often the last thing on their minds, that too only if they come from a relatively privileged background.

Even among the sports that are played in Nepal, basketball is much lower down on the priority list.

So when the Budhanilkantha Municipality Basketball Club launched the Lead Her Game project, with FIBA Foundation’s assistance, it was a leap of faith, to put it mildly.

Inspiring and Empowering the New Generation

Shreya Khadka guiding the young participants during the Lead Her Game initiative.

As a former national team player and Lead Her Game’s Program Director, Shreya Khadka understands the transformative power of basketball in building confidence, resilience, and essential life skills, especially for girls who lack access to such opportunities.

According to Shreya, as per a 2019 UNESCO report, only 8% of girls in Nepal are being exposed to organized sports compared to 28% of boys, which underpins the criticality of FIBA’s Strategic Priority “Women in Basketball” to increase female players’ participation.

Therefore, she now uses her experience to inspire and lead by example, becoming a role model to girls like Sita and helping shape a new generation of empowered young athletes.

Budhanilkantha Club’s Mission

Founded as a non-profit, the mission of Budhanilkantha Basketball Club is to promote basketball at the community level, providing opportunities for youth and individuals to engage in sports, build teamwork, and improve physical and mental well-being.

Held from December 6, 2025, to January 14, 2026, the initiative successfully mentored 90 underprivileged girls, aged 8 to 14, besides indirectly benefiting 200 individuals, including parents, family members, coaches, teachers, and other community members.

Sita’s transformation

One of the young program beneficiaries is all smiles after receiving her completion certificate and medal

As Sita attended the basketball training at two locations, engaged in team-based drills, and received guidance from national-level coaches, she gradually became more expressive. The initial frowns would be replaced by ever-widening smiles. She made new friends, actively communicated the learnings of the day to her peers, and took initiative during drills. Her self-belief grew, and she expressed a strong interest in continuing basketball, demonstrating direct personal growth in confidence, social skills, and leadership.

Team based drills encouraged peer friendships and enhanced social skills

Like Sita, the remaining 89 girls showed equally audacious advancements thanks to the guidance of Shreya.

“The Lead Her Game (LHG) project had a direct and tangible impact on both its beneficiaries (young girls) and the wider community by expanding access to sport, strengthening personal agency, and shifting attitudes toward girls’ participation in athletics,” Khadka explained, while acknowledging how she too gained courage and confidence to translate her ideas and vision into action.

Power of joining hands

Besides FIBA Foundation supplying 70 basketballs, the local government stepped in to provide logistical support, assist with volunteer mobilization, and cover essential costs such as coaches’ fees. Meanwhile, collaborations with schools significantly amplified the project’s objectives by increasing access, improving attendance and retention, and expanding the overall number of beneficiaries reached.

Even Nepal’s national women’s basketball team captain, Ms. Anusha Malla, joined as a brand ambassador.

Meanwhile, Sita’s transformation inspired her peers and encouraged parents and teachers to support girls’ participation in sports. Schools reported more engagement from other students, reflecting a broader cultural shift toward gender inclusion in physical activities.

***

The FIBA Foundation is the social and legacy arm of FIBA that addresses the role of sports and particularly basketball in society, preserving and promoting basketball’s values and its cultural heritage.

The FIBA Foundation believes that basketball has the power to empower, educate and inspire youth and facilitates this by implementing Basketball For Good projects around the world.

FIBA
translated:
बुधनिलकण्ठ (नेपाल) – १३ वर्षीय सीता लजाएल लड़की छल । नेपाल के हाशिया पर पड़ल समुदाय के निवासी ओ शुरू में अपना बारे में अनिश्चित आ बहुत आरक्षित छलीह ।

काठमांडू मे पहिल बेर लीड हर गेम कार्यक्रमक सूचना भेटला पर हुनकर माथ मे ई विचार दौड़ैत रहैत, “हमरा कोनो अंदाजा नहि अछि जे हम एतय किएक छी।”

“हम फिट भ’ सकब की?” सीता आश्चर्यचकित हेतीह, पहिने कहियो संगठित खेल मे भाग नहि लेने छलीह ।

लैंगिक समानता के लिये बास्केटबॉल

नेपाल म॑ लीड हर गेम जैसनऽ पहल फीबा केरऽ सामरिक प्राथमिकता “बास्केटबॉल म॑ महिला” के साथ संरेखित छै ताकि पूरा विश्व म॑ महिला खिलाड़ी के भागीदारी बढ़ैलऽ जाय छै नेपाल म॑ लीड हर गेम जैसनऽ पहल फीबा केरऽ सामरिक प्राथमिकता “बास्केटबॉल म॑ महिला” के साथ मिलै छै ताकि पूरा विश्व म॑ महिला खिलाड़ी के भागीदारी बढ़ैलऽ जाय सक॑ फीबा केरऽ रणनीतिक प्राथमिकता “बास्केटबॉल म॑ महिला” पूरा दुनिया म॑ महिला खिलाड़ी सिनी के भागीदारी बढ़ाबै लेली

जेना-जेना हम 8 मार्च क॑ अंतर्राष्ट्रीय महिला दिवस मनाबै छियै, ई बात क॑ स्वीकार करना जरूरी छै कि दुनिया भर केरऽ बहुत समुदाय लंबा समय स॑ चलै वाला सामाजिक मानदंडऽ के नेविगेट करना जारी रखै छै जेकरा स॑ महिला सिनी क॑ आकार देलऽ गेलऽ छै आरू ओकरा सीमित करलऽ गेलऽ छै ।

सीता सन लड़की के लेल अक्सर खेल हुनकर दिमाग में अंतिम बात होइत छनि, से सेहो तखने जखन ओ अपेक्षाकृत विशेषाधिकार प्राप्त पृष्ठभूमि सं आबय छथिन्ह.

नेपाल मे जे खेल खेलल जाइत अछि ओहि मे सेहो बास्केटबॉल प्राथमिकता सूची मे बहुत नीचा अछि ।

त॑ जब॑ बुधनिलकांत नगरपालिका बास्केटबॉल क्लब न॑ फीबा फाउंडेशन केरऽ सहायता स॑ लीड हर गेम परियोजना शुरू करलकै त॑ ई विश्वास केरऽ छलांग छेलै, एकरा हल्का म॑ कहलऽ जाय त॑ ।

नई पीढ़ी को प्रेरित एवं सशक्त बनाना

श्रेया खड्का लीड हर गेम पहल के दौरान युवा प्रतिभागी के मार्गदर्शन करते हुए |

राष्ट्रीय टीम केरऽ पूर्व खिलाड़ी आरू लीड हर गेम केरऽ प्रोग्राम डायरेक्टर के रूप म॑ श्रेया खड्का आत्मविश्वास, लचीलापन, आरू आवश्यक जीवन कौशल के निर्माण म॑ बास्केटबॉल केरऽ परिवर्तनकारी शक्ति क॑ समझै छै, खास करी क॑ वू लड़कियऽ लेली जेकरा म॑ ऐसनऽ अवसर तलक पहुँच के कमी छै ।

श्रेया के अनुसार 2019 के यूनेस्को के रिपोर्ट के अनुसार नेपाल में मात्र 8% लड़की के संगठित खेल के सामना करय पड़ि रहल अछि जखन कि 28% लड़का के संपर्क में आबि रहल अछि, जे महिला खिलाड़ी के भागीदारी बढ़ाबय लेल फिबा के रणनीतिक प्राथमिकता “बास्केटबॉल में महिला” के आलोचनात्मकता के आधार अछि.

अतः आब ओ अपन अनुभव के उपयोग उदाहरण द क प्रेरित आ नेतृत्व करय लेल करैत छथि, सीता सन लड़की के लेल रोल मॉडल बनैत छथि आ सशक्त युवा एथलीट के नव पीढ़ी के आकार देबय में मदद करैत छथि.

बुधनिलकण्ठ क्लब के मिशन

एक गैर-लाभकारी के रूप म॑ स्थापित, बुधनिलकांत बास्केटबॉल क्लब केरऽ मिशन सामुदायिक स्तर प॑ बास्केटबॉल क॑ बढ़ावा देना छै, जेकरा स॑ युवा आरू व्यक्ति क॑ खेल म॑ शामिल होय के अवसर उपलब्ध कराय देलऽ जाय, टीम वर्क के निर्माण करलऽ जाय, आरू शारीरिक आरू मानसिक भलाई म॑ सुधार करलऽ जाय ।

6 दिसंबर, 2025 सं 14 जनवरी, 2026 तइक आयोजित इ पहल 8 सं 14 साल कें उम्र कें 90 विपन्न लड़कियक कें सफलतापूर्वक मार्गदर्शन करलकय, एकर अलावा अभिभावक, परिवार कें सदस्य, कोच, शिक्षक, आ अन्य समुदाय कें सदस्यक सहित 200 व्यक्तियक कें अप्रत्यक्ष रूप सं लाभ पहुंचा देल गेलय.

सीता के परिवर्तन

कार्यक्रम के एकटा युवा लाभार्थी के पूरा करय के प्रमाण पत्र आ पदक मिलला के बाद सब मुस्कुराइत छथिन्ह

जेना-जेना सीता दू स्थान पर बास्केटबॉल प्रशिक्षण में भाग लैत गेलीह, टीम आधारित अभ्यास में लागल छलीह, आ राष्ट्रीय स्तर के कोच सब सं मार्गदर्शन प्राप्त करैत गेलीह, धीरे-धीरे ओ बेसी अभिव्यंजक भ गेलीह. प्रारंभिक भौंहक स्थान पर नित्य चौड़ा होइत मुस्कान आबि जायत । ओ नव-नव दोस्त बनौलनि, ओहि दिनक सीख केँ सक्रिय रूप सँ अपन साथी सभ केँ संप्रेषित केलनि, आ अभ्यासक दौरान पहल केलनि। हुनकऽ आत्मविश्वास बढ़ी गेलै, आरू हुनी बास्केटबॉल जारी रखै म॑ प्रबल रुचि व्यक्त करलकै, जेकरा म॑ आत्मविश्वास, सामाजिक कौशल, आरू नेतृत्व म॑ सीधा व्यक्तिगत विकास के प्रदर्शन करलकै ।

टीम आधारित अभ्यास सं साथी दोस्ती कें प्रोत्साहित कैल गेलय आ सामाजिक कौशल मे वृद्धि भेलय

सीता के तरह शेष 89 लड़की सेहो श्रेया के मार्गदर्शन के बदौलत ओतबे दुस्साहसी उन्नति देखौलनि।

खडका न॑ बतैलकै, “लीड हर गेम (एलएचजी) परियोजना न॑ अपनऽ लाभार्थी (युवा लड़कियऽ) आरू व्यापक समुदाय दूनू प॑ खेल तक पहुँच के विस्तार करी क॑, व्यक्तिगत एजेंसी क॑ मजबूत करी क॑, आरू एथलेटिक्स म॑ लड़कियऽ के भागीदारी के प्रति दृष्टिकोण क॑ बदलतें हुअ॑ सीधा आरू मूर्त प्रभाव डाललकै,” जबकि ई बात क॑ भी स्वीकार करलकै कि कोना हुनी भी अपनऽ विचार आरू दृष्टि क॑ काम म॑ बदलै के हिम्मत आरू आत्मविश्वास हासिल करलकै ।

हाथ जोड़ने की शक्ति

फीबा फाउंडेशन न॑ ७० बास्केटबॉल के आपूर्ति के अलावा स्थानीय सरकार न॑ रसद सहायता प्रदान करै, स्वयंसेवी जुटान म॑ सहायता करै, आरू कोचऽ के फीस जैसनऽ आवश्यक लागत क॑ कवर करै लेली हस्तक्षेप करलकै । एम्हर, स्कूलक कें साथ सहयोग सं परियोजना कें उद्देश्यक कें काफी बढ़ावा देल गेलय, पहुंच बढ़ा क, उपस्थिति आ रिटेन मे सुधार, आ पहुंचल लाभार्थियक कें समग्र संख्या कें विस्तार कैल गेलय.

नेपाल के राष्ट्रीय महिला बास्केटबॉल टीम के कप्तान सुश्री अनुषा मल्ला तक ब्रांड एम्बेसडर के रूप में शामिल भ गेलीह.

एम्हर सीता केरऽ परिवर्तन न॑ हुनकऽ साथी सिनी क॑ प्रेरित करलकै आरू अभिभावक आरू शिक्षकऽ क॑ खेलऽ म॑ लड़कियऽ के भागीदारी म॑ सहयोग करै लेली प्रोत्साहित करलकै । स्कूलक मे अन्य छात्रक सं बेसि जुड़ाव कें रिपोर्ट छै, जे शारीरिक गतिविधियक मे लैंगिक समावेश कें दिशा मे एकटा व्यापक सांस्कृतिक बदलाव कें दर्शा रहल छै.

*** ८.

फीबा फाउंडेशन फीबा केरऽ सामाजिक आरू विरासत शाखा छेकै जे समाज म॑ खेल आरू विशेष रूप स॑ बास्केटबॉल के भूमिका क॑ संबोधित करै छै, बास्केटबॉल केरऽ मूल्य आरू ओकरऽ सांस्कृतिक विरासत क॑ संरक्षित आरू बढ़ावा दै छै ।

फीबा फाउंडेशन के मानना ​​छै कि बास्केटबॉल म॑ युवा सिनी क॑ सशक्त, शिक्षित आरू प्रेरित करै के शक्ति छै आरू दुनिया भर म॑ बास्केटबॉल फॉर गुड परियोजना क॑ लागू करी क॑ एकरा म॑ सुविधा मिलै छै ।

title: 'F**k America, India, China...': Nepal PM Frontrunner Balen Shah's Offensive 2025 Post Resurfaces - Republic World
description: 'F**k America, India, China...': Nepal PM Frontrunner Balen Shah's Offensive 2025 Post Resurfaces  Republic World
publisher.title: Republic World
full_article:
Kathmandu: An offensive social media post made by the leading Nepal PM candidate Balendra Shah in November 2025 resurfaced on Friday as the counting of votes for the country's Parliamentary elections are underway.

In a late night post on Facebook, Shah, who was then the Mayor of Kathmandu Metropolitan City, used a derogatory word against India, America, China, Nepal's political parties Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP) and Rastriya Prajatantra Party (RPP), among others. The post had triggered a massive political storm, forcing Shah to deleted it later.

The offensive post read:

"F**k America

Advertisement

F** India

F** China

Advertisement

F**k UML

F**k Congress

F**k RSP

F**k RPP

F**k Maobaadi

You guys all combined can do nothing."

Balendra Shah's 2025 offensive post | Image: Facebook

Notably, Balen Shah got his master’s degree in structural engineering from Visvesvaraya Technological University in India's Karnataka. Shah is not new to controversy. Earlier this year, he received flak after a video showed him driving a Land Rover Defender, worth nearly 40 million Nepali rupees, while campaigning for the elections.

A former rapper with a strong appeal among youngsters, Shah is emerging victorious in early trends of the counting of votes in Nepal, following the first election in the country after the massive Gen-Z protest that toppled the KP Sharma Oli government. Shah' Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP) is leading in 94 constituencies.

युवा सब के बीच मजबूत अपील वाला पूर्व रैपर शाह नेपाल में मतगणना के प्रारंभिक प्रवृत्ति में विजयी उभर रहल छैथ, जे केपी शर्मा ओली सरकार के गिराबय वाला जेन-जेड के भारी विरोध के बाद देश में पहिल चुनाव के बाद भेल अछि। शाह' राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी 94 क्षेत्र मे अग्रणी अछि।

title: Princess Beatrice pictured with alleged Chinese spy on Nepal trip - The i Paper
description: Princess Beatrice pictured with alleged Chinese spy on Nepal trip  The i Paper
publisher.title: The i Paper
full_article:
A UK man arrested on suspicion of spying for China went to Nepal with Princess Beatrice, The i Paper can reveal.

David Taylor, 39, the husband of Labour MP Joani Reid, was arrested in London on Wednesday morning.

He and the Princess went on a nine-day charity trip with several others in October 2016.

if( window?.adverts?.addToArray ) { window.adverts.addToArray( { "pos": "inread-hb-ros-inews" } ); }

While there is no suggestion that Beatrice knew anything of Taylor’s alleged activities, the photograph shows how well-connected the public affairs professional was among Britain’s elite.

New Feature In Short Quick Stories. Same trusted journalism.

The trip was organised by the Franks Family Foundation, a charity of which Beatrice is a patron. The seven-strong group travelled by car through Asia and saw the work of Dr Sandek Ruit, a Nepalese eye surgeon who treats patients for free. Funds for the foundation come solely from its founder, Simon Franks.

According to a contemporary local report, the group visited Nepal’s Tilganga Eye Centre and Muskan Sewa Nepal Children’s Home. The Princess also held a private meeting with the Bhutanese Royal Family.

Franks confirmed the trip to The i Paper and said: “Princess Beatrice has worked tirelessly for the foundation for over a decade, supporting our education and public health projects in Laos, Cambodia and Nepal, to which she has travelled on many occasions for the foundation.

if( window?.adverts?.addToArray ) { window.adverts.addToArray( { "pos": "mpu_mobile_l1" } ); }

if( window?.adverts?.addToArray ) { window.adverts.addToArray( { "pos": "mpu_tablet_l1" } ); }

“On one of those trips, Princess Beatrice accompanied a team of doctors across Nepal, India and Bhutan. David Taylor, who was a policy advisor for the foundation, was also on that trip.”

He claimed Beatrice “did not know him prior and has not seen him since” and added: “During his time as a policy advisor to the foundation, I found David to be a kind, charitable and proud Brit. I am astonished by the arrest.”

In 2024, Beatrice’s father, Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, was also mired in controversy over his links to alleged Chinese spy Yang Tengbo.

Tengbo ran the then Duke of York’s Pitch@Palace in China, a Dragons’ Den-style project designed to encourage entrepreneurs. He was banned from the UK after security services accused him of engaging in “covert and deceptive activity” for the Chinese Communist Party. Yang denied any wrongdoing.

Last month, Mountbatten-Windsor was released under investigation after being arrested for misconduct in public office in connection with the Epstein files. Mountbatten-Windsor has consistently and strenuously denied any wrongdoing.

The latest arrests over alleged Chinese spying have rocked Westminster and Cardiff. On Wednesday, two other men were also arrested under the National Security Act: Steve Jones, 68, a former Welsh Government special adviser and Matthew Aplin, 43, a former Labour press officer.

A Senedd source described Aplin as a “Labour man through and through” but claimed he recently quit the party to join Reform.

if( window?.adverts?.addToArray ) { window.adverts.addToArray( { "pos": "mpu_mobile_l2" } ); }

if( window?.adverts?.addToArray ) { window.adverts.addToArray( { "pos": "mpu_tablet_l2" } ); }

On Wednesday, Reform UK, when asked by The i Paper , denied that Aplin was a member. However, on Thursday, the party’s Welsh leader, Dan Thomas, confirmed he did hold membership.

Thomas told ITV Wales: “I have just heard that he used to be a member of Reform. He isn’t a member right now and hasn’t been a member recently.”

Jones served as a special adviser to Hilary Armstrong – now Baroness Armstrong – the UK Government’s chief whip during Tony Blair’s premiership, then as an adviser to the Welsh Cabinet between 2009 and 2014, according to a profile of him on a company website.

All three men were released on bail on Thursday.

Searches were carried out at the properties where the arrests were made, as well as at three other addresses in London, East Kilbride and Cardiff.

Welsh journalist Martin Shipton has confirmed in an article for Nation.Cymru that police also searched his home in Cardiff in connection with the investigation. He said he gave a voluntary statement and was not arrested.

James Robinson, a former aide to ex-Labour deputy leader Tom Watson, also confirmed that police have searched his home as part of the Chinese spying investigation.

if( window?.adverts?.addToArray ) { window.adverts.addToArray( { "pos": "mpu_tablet_l3" } ); }

In a statement, he said: “I would like to make it absolutely clear that I have neither been detained, arrested nor questioned in connection with this, or any other, matter.”

Reid with her partner David Taylor (Photo: Joani Reid/Facebook)

Reid was elected as MP for East Kilbride and Strathaven in 2024 and sits on the House of Commons Home Affairs Committee. She said she is temporarily and voluntarily standing down from Labour while an internal party inquiry takes place after her husband’s arrest.

In a statement announcing the suspension, Reid said: “I want to reiterate something very important: I am not under investigation by the police and no accusations have been made against me.”

Her husband, Taylor, is the current head of programs at Asia House, a think-tank leading engagement between Asia and Europe. He previously worked as a special advisor to the Secretary of State for Wales in 2010 before spending two years as a senior political advisor for Labour.

In his role at Asia House, he oversaw the secretariat for Parliament’s All-Party Parliamentary Group (APPG) on Central Asia – a group of MPs who aim to promote relations between the UK and Central Asian countries. On Wednesday, the APPG said it had suspended its secretariat.

On his LinkedIn profile, Taylor said he was responsible for overseeing “the development and execution of strategic initiatives that connect senior government officials, business leaders, and thought leaders on critical regional and global issues”.

Publicly available corporate records show that Taylor is the director of several businesses, including lobbying firm Earthcott Ltd.

In a statement following the arrests, Reid said: “I have never seen anything to make me suspect my husband has broken any law.”

She added: “I have never been to China. I have never spoken on China or China related matters in the Commons. I have never asked a question on China-related matters.”

Security minister Dan Jarvis confirmed the arrests on Wednesday and said the Government would “not tolerate” attempts by Beijing to “obtain information on UK policymaking and interfere with our sovereign affairs”.

हुनी आरू राजकुमारी अक्टूबर २०१६ म॑ कई अन्य लोगऽ के साथ नौ दिन के चैरिटी ट्रिप प॑ गेलऽ छेलै ।

हालांकि ई बात के कोय सुझाव नै छै कि बीट्राइस क॑ टेलर केरऽ कथित गतिविधि के बारे म॑ कुछ पता छेलै, लेकिन फोटो स॑ पता चलै छै कि ब्रिटेन केरऽ अभिजात वर्ग के बीच ई जनसंपर्क पेशेवर कतेक अच्छा तरह स॑ जुड़लऽ छेलै ।

लघु त्वरित कथाओं में नया फीचर। वही भरोसेमंद पत्रकारिता।

ई यात्रा फ्रैंक्स फैमिली फाउंडेशन द्वारा आयोजित करलऽ गेलऽ छेलै, जे एगो चैरिटी छेकै, जेकरऽ संरक्षक बीट्राइस छै । सात गोट समूह गाड़ी स एशिया होइत गेल आ नेपाली नेत्र सर्जन डॉ. संडेक रुइट के काज देखलक जे मरीज के मुफ्त में इलाज करैत अछि। फाउंडेशन केरऽ फंड केवल एकरऽ संस्थापक साइमन फ्रैंक्स स॑ मिलै छै ।

समकालीन स्थानीय रिपोर्ट के अनुसार समूह नेपाल के तिलगंगा नेत्र केंद्र आ मुस्कान सेवा नेपाल बाल गृह के दौरा केलक। राजकुमारी भूटान के शाही परिवार के संग निजी बैसार सेहो केलनि।

फ्रैंक्स न॑ द आई पेपर केरऽ यात्रा के पुष्टि करतें हुअ॑ कहलकै कि राजकुमारी बीट्राइस न॑ एक दशक स॑ भी अधिक समय स॑ फाउंडेशन लेली अथक प्रयास करी क॑ लाओस, कम्बोडिया आरू नेपाल म॑ हमरऽ शिक्षा आरू जनस्वास्थ्य परियोजना के समर्थन करी रहलऽ छै, जेकरा म॑ हुनी फाउंडेशन लेली बहुत मौका प॑ गेलऽ छै ।

“ओहि यात्रा मे सँ एकटा यात्रा मे राजकुमारी बीट्राइस नेपाल, भारत आ भूटान भरि मे डॉक्टरक टीमक संग गेल छलीह। फाउंडेशन केर नीति सलाहकार डेविड टेलर सेहो ओहि यात्रा मे छलाह।”

हुनकऽ दावा छेलै कि बीट्राइस “हुनी हुनका पहलें नै जानत॑ छेली आरू तहिया स॑ भी हुनका नै देखन॑ छेली” आरू आरू कहलकै, “फाउंडेशन केरऽ नीति सलाहकार के रूप म॑ हुनकऽ समय म॑ हमरा डेविड क॑ एगो दयालु, धर्मार्थ आरू गर्वित ब्रिटिश मिललै ।हमरा गिरफ्तारी स॑ आश्चर्यचकित छै ।”

2024 म॑ बीट्राइस केरऽ पिता एंड्रयू माउंटबेटन-विंडसर भी कथित चीनी जासूस यांग टेंगबो स॑ हुनकऽ संबंध के विवाद म॑ डूबी गेलऽ छेलै ।

टेंगबो चीन म॑ तत्कालीन ड्यूक ऑफ यॉर्क केरऽ पिच@पैलेस चलाबै छेलै, जे ड्रैगन केरऽ डेन स्टाइल केरऽ प्रोजेक्ट छेलै जेकरा उद्यमी सिनी क॑ प्रोत्साहित करै लेली डिजाइन करलऽ गेलऽ छेलै । सुरक्षा सेवा न॑ चीनी कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी लेली “गुप्त आरू धोखाधड़ी वाला गतिविधि” करै के आरोप लगैला के बाद हुनका यूके स॑ प्रतिबंधित करी देलऽ गेलै । यांग कोनो गलत काज स इनकार केलक।

पिछला महीना माउंटबेटन-विंडसर कए एपस्टीन फाइल क सिलसिला मे सार्वजनिक कार्यालय मे दुराचार क मामला मे गिरफ्तार भेलाक बाद जांच क तहत रिहा करि देल गेल छल। माउंटबेटन-विंडसर लगातार आरू ज़ोरदार तरीका स॑ कोनो गलत काम स॑ इनकार करी रहलऽ छै ।

चीनी जासूसी के कथित मामला के ताजा गिरफ्तारी वेस्टमिंस्टर आ कार्डिफ के हिला देलक अछि. बुधदिन राष्ट्रीय सुरक्षा अधिनियम के तहत दू टा आओर आदमी के सेहो गिरफ्तार कएल गेल छल: वेल्स सरकार के पूर्व विशेष सलाहकार 68 वर्षीय स्टीव जोन्स आओर लेबर पार्टी के प्रेस अधिकारी 43 वर्षीय मैथ्यू एप्लिन.

सेनेड केरऽ एगो सूत्र न॑ एप्लिन क॑ “लेबर मैन थ्रू एंड थ्रू” बतैलकै लेकिन दावा करलकै कि हुनी हाल ही म॑ पार्टी छोड़ी क॑ रिफॉर्म म॑ शामिल होय गेलऽ छै ।

कंपनी केरऽ वेबसाइट प॑ हुनकऽ प्रोफाइल के अनुसार, जोन्स न॑ टोनी ब्लेयर केरऽ प्रीमियरशिप के दौरान हिलेरी आर्मस्ट्रांग – अब॑ बैरोनेस आर्मस्ट्रांग – यूके सरकार केरऽ मुख्य सचेतक – केरऽ विशेष सलाहकार के रूप म॑ काम करलकै, तभिये २००९ आरू २०१४ के बीच वेल्स कैबिनेट केरऽ सलाहकार के रूप म॑ काम करलकै ।

तीनू गोटे के गुरुवार के जमानत पर रिहा क देल गेल।

गिरफ्तारी केरऽ संपत्ति के साथ-साथ लंदन, ईस्ट किलब्रिड आरू कार्डिफ केरऽ तीन अन्य पता प॑ भी खोज करलऽ गेलै ।

वेल्स केरऽ पत्रकार मार्टिन शिपटन न॑ नेशन.सिमरू लेली एगो लेख म॑ ई बात के पुष्टि करलकै कि पुलिस न॑ जांच के सिलसिला म॑ कार्डिफ म॑ हुनकऽ घर के भी तलाशी लेलकै । ओ कहलनि जे, ओ स्वैच्छिक बयान देलनि आ गिरफ्तार नहि भेलाह।

लेबर पार्टी केरऽ पूर्व उपनेता टॉम वाटसन केरऽ पूर्व सहायक जेम्स रॉबिन्सन न॑ भी ई बात के पुष्टि करलकै कि चीनी जासूसी जांच के तहत पुलिस न॑ हुनकऽ घर के तलाशी लेल॑ छै ।

एकटा बयान मे ओ कहलनि जे, हम एकदम साफ करय चाहब जे एहि, या कोनो आन मामला के संबंध मे हमरा नहि त हिरासत मे लेल गेल अछि, नहि गिरफ्तार कायल गेल अछि आ ने पूछताछ कएल गेल अछि।”

रीड २०२४ म॑ ईस्ट किलब्रिड आरू स्ट्रैथवेन केरऽ सांसद चुनलऽ गेलऽ छेलै आरू हाउस आफ कॉमन्स केरऽ गृह मामलऽ के समिति म॑ बैठलऽ छै । ओ कहलनि जे ओ अस्थायी आ स्वेच्छा सं लेबर पार्टी सं हटि रहल छथिन्ह जखन कि हुनकर पति के गिरफ्तारी के बाद पार्टी के आंतरिक जांच भ रहल अछि.

निलंबन के घोषणा करैत एकटा बयान मे रीड कहलनि जे, हम एकटा बहुत महत्वपूर्ण बात दोहराबय चाहैत छी: हमरा पर पुलिस जांच नहि भ रहल अछि आ हमरा पर कोनो आरोप नहि लागल अछि।

हुनकऽ पति टेलर एशिया आरू यूरोप के बीच एगो थिंक-टैंक अग्रणी जुड़ाव एशिया हाउस म॑ वर्तमान म॑ कार्यक्रम केरऽ प्रमुख छै । एहि सं पहिने ओ 2010 मे वेल्स के विदेश सचिव के विशेष सलाहकार के रूप मे काज केने छलाह आओर फेर दू साल लेबर पार्टी के वरिष्ठ राजनीतिक सलाहकार के रूप मे काज केने छलाह.

एशिया हाउस म॑ अपनऽ भूमिका म॑ हुनी मध्य एशिया प॑ संसद केरऽ सर्वदलीय संसदीय समूह (एपीपीजी) केरऽ सचिवालय के देखरेख करलकै – जे सांसदऽ के एगो समूह छेकै जेकरऽ उद्देश्य यूके आरू मध्य एशियाई देशऽ के बीच संबंध क॑ बढ़ावा देना छेलै । बुधदिन एपीपीजी कहलक जे ओ अपन सचिवालय निलंबित क देलक अछि।

अपनऽ लिंक्डइन प्रोफाइल प॑ टेलर न॑ कहलकै कि हुनकऽ जिम्मेदारी छै कि हुनी “रणनीतिक पहलऽ के विकास आरू निष्पादन के देखरेख करै जे वरिष्ठ सरकारी अधिकारी, व्यापारिक नेता, आरू विचारक नेता सिनी क॑ महत्वपूर्ण क्षेत्रीय आरू वैश्विक मुद्दा प॑ जोड़ै छै” ।

सार्वजनिक रूप स॑ उपलब्ध कॉरपोरेट रिकॉर्ड स॑ पता चलै छै कि टेलर कईएक व्यवसाय के निदेशक छै, जेकरा म॑ पैरवी फर्म अर्थकोट लिमिटेड भी शामिल छै ।

गिरफ्तारी के बाद जारी बयान में रीड कहलनि जे, हम कहियो एहन चीज नहि देखलहुं जाहि सं हमरा शक हो जे हमर पति कोनो कानून के उल्लंघन केने छथि।

सुरक्षा मंत्री डैन जार्विस न॑ बुधवार क॑ गिरफ्तारी के पुष्टि करतें हुअ॑ कहलकै कि सरकार बीजिंग द्वारा “यूके केरऽ नीति निर्माण के जानकारी प्राप्त करै आरू हमरऽ संप्रभु मामलऽ म॑ हस्तक्षेप करै” के कोशिश क॑ “सह्य नै” करतै ।

title: In Nepal elections, trends point towards generational shift in leadership - The Indian Express
description: In Nepal elections, trends point towards generational shift in leadership  The Indian Express
publisher.title: The Indian Express
full_article:
The elections in Nepal are being conducted successfully and peacefully after last year’s major Gen Z–led protests, which toppled the K P Sharma Oli government. The Nepalese interim government’s Prime Minister, Sushila Karki, has stated, “We will try for a quick handover because youths have huge expectations of the new government.” As per Nepal’s Election Commission, 60 per cent of the 19 million registered voters exercised their right to vote. The issues on which the elections were contested were the same as those raised during last year’s protests: Corruption, unemployment, inequality, and economic stagnation.

The total number of seats in the Nepalese Parliament is 275, out of which Nepalese voters directly elect 165 members of the House of Representatives, which is the lower house of Parliament, while the remaining 110 seats are decided as per the proportional representation system. Under this, the political parties nominate lawmakers according to each party’s vote share.
translated:
के पी शर्मा ओली सरकार के उखाड़ि फेकय वाला पिछला साल जेन जेड के नेतृत्व मे भेल पैघ विरोध प्रदर्शन के बाद नेपाल मे चुनाव सफलतापूर्वक आ शांतिपूर्ण तरीका सं भ रहल अछि. नेपालक अंतरिम सरकारक प्रधानमन्त्री सुशीला कार्की कहलनि अछि जे, “हमरा लोकनि शीघ्र हस्तान्तरणक प्रयास करब, कारण नव सरकार सँ युवा लोकनि केँ बहुत पैघ उम्मीद अछि।” नेपाल के निर्वाचन आयोग के अनुसार पंजीकृत एक करोड़ 90 लाख मतदाता में स 60 प्रतिशत मतदाता अपन मतदान के अधिकार के प्रयोग केलक। जे मुद्दा पर चुनाव लड़ल गेल छल ओ ओहिना छल जेना पिछला साल के विरोध प्रदर्शन के दौरान उठल छल : भ्रष्टाचार, बेरोजगारी, असमानता, आओर आर्थिक ठहराव.

नेपाली संसदमे कुल सीटके संख्या २७५ अछि, जाहिमे नेपाली मतदाता सीधा प्रतिनिधि सभामे १६५ सदस्य चुनैत छथि, जे संसदक निचला सदन अछि, जखन कि शेष ११० सीट आनुपातिक प्रतिनिधित्व प्रणालीक अनुसार निर्णय कएल जाइत अछि । एकर तहत राजनीतिक दल प्रत्येक पार्टी के वोट हिस्सेदारी के हिसाब सं विधायक के नामांकन करैत अछि.

full_article:
You’re reading The Morning Dispatch, our flagship daily newsletter explaining all the news you need to know today in fewer than 15 minutes. To unlock the full version, become a Dispatch member today .

Happy Friday! A New Jersey Girl Scout troop paired up with a weed dispensary to sell cookies—a massive success, according to the dispensary owner, and a disciplinary matter, according to Girl Scout leadership. The girls, for their part, just needed to hit their numbers.

Quick Hits: Today’s Top Stories

New Information on Iranian School Strike

A Saturday strike that hit a girls’ school building in the town of Minab, Iran, near the Strait of Hormuz, was in the immediate vicinity of Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps facilities struck by U.S. missiles at the same time, a New York Times visuals investigation has found. Iran state sources say that at least 175 people, most of them likely children, were killed at the school. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said Wednesday that the government was not aware of a U.S. strike on the school, and that the Department of Defense was investigating the matter. U.S. and Israeli forces continued to conduct hit targets inside Iran on Thursday, with Iranian retaliatory attacks hitting an airport in Azerbaijan and Iranian forces claiming that they had struck a U.S. oil tanker in the Persian Gulf. The Israeli military is reportedly planning for at least one to two more weeks of strikes in Iran.

Iran also struck the headquarters of Kurdish opposition groups in Iraq, amid reports that Iranian Kurdish groups were in talks with the U.S. for military support and possibly preparing for a ground invasion of Iran.

“I’m once again calling on all members of the Iranian Revolutionary Guard, the military and police, to lay down their arms,” President Donald Trump said Thursday.

Hezbollah has reportedly been moving Radwan forces into southern Lebanon in preparation for a possible ground offensive, prompting Israeli troops to reinforce their positions in the country and order tens of thousands of residents to evacuate.

Noem Ousted From DHS

President Donald Trump fired Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem on Thursday, bringing an end to her roughly 14-month tenure and making her the first Cabinet secretary to leave their post. Noem’s position has been increasingly embattled in recent months, with the deaths of Renee Good and Alex Pretti at the hands of federal agents marking a turning point for public approval of DHS’s mass deportation program. Noem has also reportedly clashed with other federal officials, been accused of conducting an affair with a top aide, and faced bipartisan skepticism over a $220 million ad campaign that featured Noem prominently. Audrey Fahlberg of National Review broke the news that Trump was angered by Noem’s claim during a Senate hearing that he had signed off on the ad campaign, which he denied on Thursday.

An administration official told NBC that the firing was “a culmination of her many unfortunate leadership failures including the fallout in Minnesota, the ad campaign, the allegations of infidelity, the mismanagement of her staff, and her constant feuding with the heads of other agencies, including CBP and ICE.”

In his Truth Social post announcing the decision, Trump said that Sen. Markwayne Mullin, a Republican from Oklahoma, would serve as her replacement effective March 31.

A Senate vote must confirm the Homeland Security secretary.

White House Changes Nvidia Policy

Bloomberg News reported Thursday that the Trump administration has drafted rules that would give the U.S. government broad control over shipments of AI chips from the U.S. Under the plan, virtually all international shipments of advanced chips manufactured by companies like Nvidia and Advanced Micro Devices, Inc., would require permission from the U.S. Commerce Department. The approval process will be based on the amount of computational power desired by international customers, officials said, with more stringent requirements for larger shipments and national governments becoming involved in the process for the largest deployments. Previous rules, set by the Biden administration and scrapped by the Trump administration in May, blacklisted certain countries, including China, but gave close U.S. allies broad leeway in importing chips.

“The Commerce Department is committed to promoting secure exports of the American tech stack,” the department tweeted.

“We successfully advanced exports through our historic Middle East agreements, and there are ongoing internal government discussions about formalizing that approach,” the department added, referring to agreements with Saudi Arabia and the United Arab Emirates that allowed for chip exports in exchange for reciprocal investment.

Countries Request Ukraine’s Help in Thwarting Iranian Drones

Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said Thursday that various countries—including the U.S., European nations, and countries in the Middle East—were asking for his country’s assistance in defending against Iranian Shahed drones, which have been used extensively in Russia’s attacks on Ukraine. The relatively low-speed, mass-produced drones are much more numerous and far less expensive than the interceptor missiles most countries utilize as the backbone of their air defense systems. They have scored multiple hits on targets throughout the Middle East, including the only U.S. casualties of the war so far, in a strike on a port in Kuwait that killed six U.S. servicemembers. Russia regularly attacks Ukrainian cities and critical infrastructure using hundreds of drones, and Ukraine has developed a network of effective countermeasures in response. Zelensky said his country would only provide limited interceptor drones in exchange for Patriot missiles.

On Thursday, the U.S. was among four nations on the 35-state board of the International Atomic Energy Agency to oppose a resolution condemning Russian attacks on Ukrainian energy infrastructure as a threat to nuclear safety. “While we continue supporting the IAEA’s work in-country, ​we do not support the Board’s current consideration of an unnecessary resolution that does not ​help achieve peace between Ukraine and Russia,” the U.S. said in a statement.

Ukraine also continued attacks on Russia’s energy infrastructure, launching dozens of drones at an oil refinery in the southwestern region of Saratov.

Medical Schools Agree to Add Nutrition Training

The Department of Health and Human Services announced Thursday that 53 medical schools had agreed to support Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s push to require nutrition training as part of their curriculum. Starting in fall 2026, the schools will require at least 40 hours of nutrition education training or a 40-hour competency requirement. The announcement comes a day after Kennedy’s campaign to pressure medical schools to provide more nutrition training, which included threatening to withdraw federal funding, though the schools ultimately agreed to sign off after he adopted a more conciliatory stance.

The Department of Health and Human Services has proposed 71 “core nutrition competencies,” based on a 2024 statement in the Journal of the American Medical Association’s Network Open that advocated for “identifying nutrient-deficient states, interpreting metabolic biomarkers, the micronutrient contents of foods, pathological states affecting nutrient absorption, forming healthy lifelong dietary patterns for chronic disease patients, and the principles of a balanced diet.”

Nutrition has long been a major concern for Kennedy, who frequently blames chronic disease in the U.S. on an overreliance on medication and poor diets.

The schools include the Geisel School of Medicine at Dartmouth, George Washington University School of Medicine and Health Sciences, Tufts University School of Medicine, and the University of California, Irvine.

Peak Democracy People gather to cast their ballot at a polling station during Nepal's parliamentary election in Kathmandu on March 5, 2026. (Photo by PRABIN RANABHAT / AFP via Getty Images)

On September 4, 2025, the Nepalese government imposed a social media ban. The state’s reasoning was to curb misinformation, fraud, and “hate speech,” but the youth of Nepal saw it instead as a censorship campaign intended to protect a corrupt government. And so, they took to the streets in protest, which soon turned into a popular uprising.

Less than a week after the law took effect, fiery youth-led protests left the country’s parliament building smoldering, law enforcement clashed with the demonstrators—opening fire and killing dozens—and Prime Minister K.P. Sharma Oli had no choice but to resign. Power was handed over to the army for three days, and then given to an interim government led by the country’s former chief justice, Sushila Karki.

That was six months ago, and yesterday, voters went to the polls to select a new government, which they hope can provide more stability and less corruption.

The results are still rolling in, but with votes reported in more than one-third of the seats up for grabs in Thursday’s election, former Kathmandu Mayor Balendra Shah and his party hold a commanding lead.

Nepal’s parliament has 275 seats—165 directly elected and 110 later allocated through a proportional system. In the ongoing count, Shah’s party currently holds a commanding lead, ahead in 105 seats, with one seat won. Oli’s Communist Party of Nepal (Unified Marxist-Leninist) holds a distant second place, leading in only 11 seats, tied with its rival, the Communist Party of Nepal (Maoist Centre). The center-left Nepali Congress is in third place, leading in 9 seats, and winning one. The populist nationalist Shram Sanskriti Party leads in four seats, and two other parties—the monarchist Rastriya Prajatantra Party and the Madhesi socialist Janata Samajbadi Party–each lead in one seat.

Shah’s party looks set to decisively outrun Oli’s—and Shah himself is on track to defeat Oli in his own constituency of Jhapa-5, where he currently leads with more than 6,500 votes to Oli’s 1,400.

You are receiving the free, truncated version of The Morning Dispatch . To read the full newsletter—and unlock all of our stories, podcasts, community benefits, and our newest feature, Dispatch Voiced, which allows you to listen to our written stories in your own podcast feed—join The Dispatch as a paying member.

Nepalese officials said that election turnout came in at 58 percent, slightly less than the 61.6 percent turnout of Nepal’s 2022 election. Officials are expecting the final tally to be completed by this evening or Saturday. Oli’s poor electoral performance shows that, six months after the youth-led protests led him to resign the premiership, voters aren’t craving a return. It was Oli’s government that imposed a rigid social media law, requiring online platforms to register with the government and agree to certain limits. Many companies, including Facebook, YouTube, Instagram, and X, refused and were subsequently banned in the country. Soon, the country had fallen into chaos. As TMD reported then: Per Nepali authorities, at least 72 people were killed in the protests, and more than 1,300 have been injured [Note: the injury count was later adjusted up to more than 2,000 and official death count raised to 76]. The government also instituted a curfew, widely ignored, that allowed residents to leave their homes for a few hours a day to buy food and supplies. … Along with the parliament building, mobs inflicted damage on the Supreme Court, local police stations, elected leaders’ homes—including those of several former prime ministers—and private businesses. The country’s largest media company, Kantipur Media Group, paused two of its digital publications after fires, set by protesters, destroyed their servers and damaged their offices. The young Nepalese demonstrators weren’t just lashing out against a government that tried to take away their social media, but also a government that, in their view, condoned corruption and cared only for the elites, the wealthy, and the well-connected. According to data from the World Bank, the country’s real GDP per capita growth was 2.8 percent in 2024, and the lack of economic growth has hit Nepal’s youth particularly hard by constraining the labor market. The unemployment rate for Nepalese workers between 15 and 24 has remained consistently above 20 percent since 2020. Economic discontent spread through social media last year, with many users voicing frustration toward generational wealth, which they saw as perpetuated through government graft, leading to the viralization of nepotism-related posts with the hashtag “#nepokids.” Nepal’s new government will likely put cleaning up corruption at the top of its priorities, and hopefully last longer in office than most recent Nepalese governments. Even before September’s riots, changes in political leadership were common, with 14 different governments having held ruling power since Nepal’s constitutional monarchy ended in 2008. Shah, the 35-year-old independent former mayor of Kathmandu and Nepal’s likely next prime minister, had not been affiliated with a political party before this election cycle, and is a relative newcomer to politics. Until 2022—when he was elected mayor of the country’s capital and largest city (his first and only political office)—Shah was a Nepalese rapper, who in 2013 released a song mocking the Nepalese police for harassing youths for having long hair. Shah has always connected with both listeners and voters through social media, and unlike most elected officials, Shah publicly backed the anti-government protests in September, which ultimately took down the national government seated in his city. In January, he resigned as Kathmandu’s mayor to join the centrist Rastriya Swatantra Party as its prime ministerial candidate. And after polls closed on Thursday, he took to social media to thank the interim government’s leader, Karki. “Under your leadership, democracy has triumphed today,” he wrote in posts shared on platforms including X, Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook. While mayor, Shah pursued corruption in government, cracked down on tax evaders, and strengthened enforcement of building codes. Shah also went after people he said were illegally taking advantage of public spaces and walkways, including squatters—whom he called “illegal settlers”—and unlicensed street vendors. While his efforts to make sure laws were enforced were broadly popular, human rights advocates have raised alarm about what they identified as rising authoritarian tendencies. In March 2024, human rights advocates wrote an open letter criticizing Shah’s city administration after city police allegedly beat street vendors and destroyed their goods. On the issue of city-level corruption, Shah “gets the credit for cleaning things up,” David Gellner, professor emeritus at the University of Oxford and former head of its School of Anthropology and Museum Ethnography, told TMD. “The problem about [Shah] is that he’s quite dictatorial. He doesn’t seem to care much about the rule of law,” Gellner explained, noting that he has prioritized enforcement over legal procedure. In August 2022, the city government attempted to demolish an illegally constructed annex built by Norvic International Hospital on public land in Thapathali, only for the Nepalese Supreme Court to intervene, preventing Shah’s administration from dismantling the structures. Shah joked on social media that he wanted to propose a constitutional amendment “to give the Supreme Court all the authority related to approving the building design and taking action against illegal constructions.” Shah’s active use of social media has not always played well. In November, he posted an expletive-laden screed on Facebook, lashing out at Nepal’s major parties—including the Rastriya Swatantra Party he now leads—and at foreign powers including the U.S., China, and India, concluding: “You Guys all Combined can do nothing.” He deleted it 30 minutes later. Many of Shah’s supporters support his zeal for weeding out corruption, even if that means cutting some legal corners. “For many youth who are totally frustrated, quite rightly frustrated by bureaucratic stuff and very angry about kind of the ‘nepo babies’ and the flaunting of wealth by these people who’ve got rich through corrupt means, of course, they want quick action,” Gellner said. “They don’t want somebody hide behind procedures all the time.” Shah and the Rastriya Swatantra Party likely won’t win enough seats to obtain the premiership through an outright parliamentary majority, but appear to be best situated to lead a ruling coalition when the newly elected officials take office. This outcome is hardly uncommon in Nepal, where no single party has won an outright majority since 2008, and coalition governments are the norm. But this has also contributed to Nepal’s unstable leadership. Following the 2022 election, Pushpa Kamal Dahal became prime minister through a power-sharing agreement between his Maoist Communist Party, Oli’s Marxist-Leninist Communist Party, the Janamat Party, the Rastriya Prajatantra Party, the Janata Samajbadi Party, the Nagarik Unmukti Party, and the Rastrya Swatantra Party. After 19 months, that government fell apart and Oli succeeded Dahal as prime minister after his party joined forces with the Nepali Congress Party. Unlike Dahal or Oli, Shah arrives without the baggage of decades in coalition politics—and with what looks like an emphatic popular mandate. RSP’s early lead suggests the party could come close to, or even reach, a parliamentary majority—an outcome with few modern precedents in Nepal. Whether Shah needs coalition partners at all will become clear as final counts come in, but even a near-majority would give him far greater governing leverage than any of his recent predecessors. “The Gen Z revolutionaries … just want government to work,” Gellner said. “They just want good governance. They want no corruption. They want to be able to get their business done with the government without having to give bribes.” If Shah forms a government, the question then is whether he can provide the stability and anti-corruption crackdown he’s promised. For the Gen Z protesters who burned down parliament to get here, the answer had better be yes.

Trump told Axios in a phone interview that he wanted Israeli President Isaac Herzog to issue a pardon for Netanyahu “today.”

Republican Rep. Tony Gonzales announced that he would end his reelection bid, one day after the House Ethics Committee launched an investigation into possible misconduct and he admitted to having an affair with a current congressional employee, who later killed herself.

Finland plans to amend an 1987 law prohibiting the country from hosting any nuclear weapons in its territory.

Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto, while speaking to leaders of Muslim groups, pledged to withdraw from the Trump-led Board of Peace if it does not take sufficient action to help Palestinians.

Japan’s health ministry approved the world’s first commercially available iPS stem-cell therapy for Parkinson’s disease.

The southern Indian state of Karnataka became the country’s first region to ban online users under the age of 16 from using social media.

The Pentagon officially designated AI company Anthropic a supply chain risk “effective immediately” after CEO Dario Amodei apologized for a leaked internal memo that called OpenAI’s Pentagon deal “safety theater” and accused the Trump administration of demanding “dictator-style praise.” Anthropic says it plans to challenge the designation in court.

Shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz—through which roughly 20 percent of the world’s daily oil supply flows—has come to a near-total halt amid Iranian attacks.

OpenAI released its latest model, GPT-5.4, which offers native computer use, is more adept at using financial services tools, and leads on the dominant AI benchmarks.

ईरानी स्कूल हड़ताल पर नया जानकारी

न्यूयॉर्क टाइम्स केरऽ विजुअल जांच म॑ पता चललै छै कि ईरान केरऽ मिनाब शहर म॑ होर्मुज जलडमरूमध्य के पास एगो लड़कियऽ के स्कूल केरऽ इमारत प॑ शनिदिन हमला करलऽ गेलऽ छेलै, ई हमला इस्लामिक रिवोल्यूशनरी गार्ड कोर केरऽ सुविधा के ठीक आसपास छेलै जेकरा म॑ अमेरिकी मिसाइल स॑ हमला करलऽ गेलऽ छेलै । ईरान केरऽ राज्य सूत्रऽ के कहना छै कि ई स्कूल म॑ कम स॑ कम १७५ लोगऽ के मौत होय गेलऽ छै, जेकरा म॑ अधिकांश बच्चा होय के संभावना छै । व्हाइट हाउस केरऽ प्रेस सचिव कैरोलिन लीविट न॑ बुधवार क॑ कहलकै कि सरकार क॑ स्कूल प॑ अमेरिकी हमला के जानकारी नै छै, आरू रक्षा विभाग ई मामला के जांच करी रहलऽ छै । गुरुवार क॑ ईरान के भीतर अमेरिकी आरू इजरायली सेना न॑ हिट निशाना प॑ हमला जारी रखलकै, जेकरा म॑ ईरानी जवाबी हमला अजरबैजान केरऽ एगो हवाई अड्डा प॑ हमला करलकै आरू ईरानी सेना न॑ दावा करलकै कि ओकरा न॑ फारस के खाड़ी म॑ अमेरिकी तेल टैंकर प॑ हमला करलकै । खबर छै कि इजरायली सेना ईरान म॑ कम स॑ कम एक स॑ दू सप्ताह आरू हमला करै के योजना बना रहलऽ छै ।

ईरान न॑ इराक म॑ कुर्द विपक्षी समूहऽ के मुख्यालय प॑ भी हमला करलकै, ई खबर के बीच कि ईरानी कुर्द समूह सैन्य समर्थन लेली आरू संभवतः ईरान प॑ जमीनी हमला के तैयारी लेली अमेरिका स॑ बातचीत करी रहलऽ छै ।

राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप नँ गुरुवार क कहलकै कि हम्में एक बार फेरू ईरानी रिवोल्यूशनरी गार्ड के सब सदस्य, सेना आरू पुलिस स॑ आह्वान करी रहलऽ छियै कि हुनी अपनऽ हथियार बिछाबै ।

खबर छै कि हिजबुल न॑ संभावित जमीनी हमला के तैयारी म॑ रदवान सेना क॑ दक्षिणी लेबनान म॑ स्थानांतरित करी रहलऽ छै, जेकरा स॑ इजरायली सैनिक न॑ देश म॑ अपनऽ ठिकाना मजबूत करी क॑ दसियों हजार निवासी क॑ बाहर निकलै के आदेश देल॑ छै ।

नोएम डीएचएस स बेदखल

राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप न॑ गुरुवार क॑ होमलैंड सुरक्षा विभाग केरऽ सचिव क्रिस्टी नोएम क॑ बर्खास्त करी देलकै, जेकरा स॑ हुनकऽ लगभग १४ महीना के कार्यकाल के अंत होय गेलै आरू हुनकऽ पद छोड़ै वाला पहिलऽ कैबिनेट सचिव बनी गेलै । नोएम केरऽ स्थिति म॑ हाल केरऽ महीना म॑ तेजी स॑ लड़ाई लड़लऽ गेलऽ छै, जेकरा म॑ संघीय एजेंटऽ के हाथऽ स॑ रेनी गुड आरू एलेक्स प्रेट्टी केरऽ मौत डीएचएस केरऽ सामूहिक निर्वासन कार्यक्रम क॑ सार्वजनिक मंजूरी लेली एगो मोड़ के रूप म॑ सामने ऐलऽ छै । खबर छै कि नोएम केरऽ अन्य संघीय अधिकारियऽ स॑ भी झड़प होय गेलऽ छै, एक शीर्ष सहायक के साथ अफेयर करै के आरोप लगैलऽ गेलऽ छै, आरू २२ करोड़ डॉलर के विज्ञापन अभियान प॑ द्विपक्षीय संदेह के सामना करना पड़लऽ छै, जेकरा म॑ नोएम क॑ प्रमुखता स॑ पेश करलऽ गेलऽ छेलै । नेशनल रिव्यू केरऽ ऑड्रे फाल्बर्ग न॑ ई खबर क॑ तोड़ी देलकै कि ट्रंप न॑ सीनेट केरऽ सुनवाई के दौरान नोएम केरऽ ई दावा स॑ नाराज छेलै कि हुनी विज्ञापन अभियान प॑ हस्ताक्षर करलकै, जेकरा स॑ हुनी गुरुवार क॑ खंडन करी देलकै ।

प्रशासन केरऽ एगो अधिकारी न॑ एनबीसी क॑ बतैलकै कि ई फायरिंग “हुनकरऽ बहुत दुर्भाग्यपूर्ण नेतृत्व विफलता के पराकाष्ठा छेकै जेकरा म॑ मिनेसोटा म॑ पड़लऽ परिणाम, विज्ञापन अभियान, बेवफाई के आरोप, हुनकऽ कर्मचारी केरऽ कुप्रबंधन, आरू सीबीपी आरू आईसीई सहित अन्य एजेंसी केरऽ प्रमुखऽ स॑ हुनकऽ लगातार झगड़ा शामिल छेलै ।”

ई फैसला के घोषणा करतें हुअ॑ अपनऽ ट्रूथ सोशल पोस्ट म॑ ट्रंप न॑ कहलकै कि ओकलाहोमा केरऽ रिपब्लिकन सेन मार्कवेन मुलिन ३१ मार्च स॑ प्रभावी ढंग स॑ हुनकऽ जगह प॑ काम करतै ।
